title: Pistolochia repens
intro: Pistolochia repens, also known as Pistil root, is a type of plant in the family Celastraceae, traditionally used in herbal medicine. The health benefits of Pistolochia repens include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are believed to aid in reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress. Bioactive constituents of the plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Pistolochia repens is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, often combined with other herbs like ginseng and licorice root to enhance its health benefits.
